title: Pin the headings for Sub Items

posts.author: MsEllen (Ellen Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please consider having the ability to pin the headings of columns for sub items.
When there are multiple rows and multiple columns, it’s impossible to remember what they all are.

I’ve mirrored the sub items to have the same headings as the Items, but those don’t hold either when viewing multiple lines of sub items.

posts.author: JessWinn09 (Jessica Winn)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed! We work with campaigns that have tons of subitems and a million columns - this feature is a must.
